## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] `pnpm test` passing
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] If a lib was changed, unit tests are added or updated
- [ ] If a UI feature was added, the README feature table is updated
